[SDNOPT1-1202]:update ccsdk-sli/adaptors/aai-service to latest v24 interface and code changes for Narad DSL queries

[SDNOPT1-1202]:fixaai-service/provider pom verstion

[SDNCP-2117] Add env support in partners.json

[SDNCP-1845] Fixes for Veracode errors

Contains fixes for the following issues identified by Veracode
scans:
470   Use of Externally-Controlled Input to Select Classes or Code ('Unsafe Reflection') - in SvcLogicClassResolver.java
611   Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference - in mdsal adaptor (RestService.java)

[SDNCP-2172] Add missing mapping entries to aai-path.properties

Some entries in the legacy sli-adaptors version of aai-path.properties are
missing from the current netsys/ccsdk-sli version.  This change adds those
entries.  Note: there are entries in this version that are not in the legacy
version, possibly because they are used in some ONAP flows not used
internally.  There is no need to sync this change back to sli-adaptors

Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>
